newsSince: No material new fundamentals since June 9. PDF Solutions announced its CONNECT 2026 conference (Oct 15-16) on June 2 and held its annual meeting June 16 (director elections, auditor, equity-plan top-up) - both routine. Consensus skews Buy with momentum, though average sell-side targets (~$54) remain below the +107% YTD stock.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO/alpha lens: PDFS is EDA/yield-analytics, not co-packaged-optics; theme fit is adjacent. No new fundamental news, only CONNECT/AGM housekeeping. Crowding asymmetry incrementally worse as stock sits well above ~$54 sell-side targets on +107% YTD; small negative, not a rank cut.
verdicts.bull: Exensio/DFI traction and AI-fab analytics demand support durable double-digit growth.
verdicts.neutral: Quiet news flow; momentum-driven rally outrunning fundamentals and price targets.
verdicts.bear: Single-bundle validation risk; valuation stretched ~30%+ above targets after a parabolic run.

verdicts.rankRationale: Test-time-scaling lens: yield-analytics/process-data software is a credible enabler of larger fab output for AI compute. No fundamental change since June 9 (only conference/AGM news), so hold rank 7; the rich YTD is a separate re-rating input.
verdicts.bull: Process-data software scales with fab complexity and AI-chip volume, a structural tailwind.
verdicts.neutral: No new datapoints; thesis intact but priced for growth.
verdicts.bear: Indirect to compute scaling; valuation leaves little room for execution slips.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Fab data-analytics demand from AI capacity additions
